name: cart_page_4_cart

observed_strengths.observation: Shopping journey confirms cart_upsell_present: TRUE — the cart displays product upsell recommendations when items are in cart; this is the only store of the 4 tested to have a live, populating cart upsell (deathwishcoffee had the section but it didn't populate)
Shopping journey confirms urgency_elements_present: TRUE — the cart shows urgency signals (free shipping threshold or countdown) when items are in cart; uniquely strong among all 4 tested stores
Shopping journey confirms trust_badges_at_checkout: TRUE — payment security signals present at highest-anxiety step in the funnel

missing_or_weak.observation: Empty cart (mudwtr.com/cart) canonically redirects to homepage — the empty cart state shows homepage content, not a cart recovery page with 'Your cart is empty' + recommended products. An empty-cart recovery experience is a missed conversion opportunity for return visitors
No email capture heading visible in cart headings — unlike deathwishcoffee and zenrojas which captured email in the cart, mudwtr's cart structure (in empty state) shows only homepage content

purchase_path_notes: Cart with items in it is the strongest of all 4 stores: live upsell + urgency + trust badges + 5.0/5 friction. The only gap is the empty cart state, which redirects to homepage rather than showing a recovery experience.
